title: SHC Recovery Skull
body:
No Optifine Required

A convencional compass but blue, that's sooooo boring. 
This pack change that compass from a skull to locate your last death point!

The eyes of the skull gonna start glowing gradually if you look in the right direction.

Also You can use it like a helmet with this command:
/item replace entity @p armor.head with minecraft:recovery_compass

Have a nice day!
